1_instruction_adherence.notes: Report demonstrates systematic review of faction profile against SKILL.md rules and output format count rules. Does not explicitly trace through each SKILL.md section.

2_output_completeness.notes: All required sections present. Detection documented with description, location(file+line), violated rule, evidence, severity, and false positive check.

3_interest_driven_realism.notes: Planted defect found with file+line evidence (L38-46). Rule identification 铁律二:内部必有矛盾 correctly matches SKILL.md rule 2.

4_internal_conflict.notes: Explicit false positive check conducted. All other sections (层级结构, 跨势力动态, 利益驱动, 锚点角色) verified structurally valid. Output format count rules referenced for threshold verification.

5_cross_faction_dynamics.notes: Rule 铁律二:内部必有矛盾 correctly identified by SKILL.md name. Rule application is direct - faction with zero internal conflict violates the requirement explicitly.

6_anchor_character_consistency.notes: Evidence citation includes exact file path (world/factions/meidelan-maiban.md) and line numbers (L38-46). Direct inline quotes from source material provided.

7_behavioral_predictability.notes: Planted defect detected with file+line evidence. Rule identification correct.

8_prose_quality.notes: N/A exempted per rubric. Prose quality is a content-generation metric with no meaningful bug-hunt interpretation. Weights renormalized.
